status: AUTHORITATIVE — official PA Commonwealth Careers job specs + ST pay schedule
administering_agency: Pennsylvania Department of Labor & Industry (DLI), Bureau of Disability Determination
salary_schedule_title: Commonwealth of Pennsylvania Standard Pay Schedule (Pay Scale Type ST), effective July 1, 2025
bargaining_status: SEIU Local 668 (Pennsylvania Social Services Union); adjudicators in bargaining unit F4, supervisor in F5
step_basis: annual (PA publishes Minimum/Maximum Annual at 75-hour and 80-hour biweekly bases; 75-hour = 37.5 hr/week standard work week for these classes)
notes: All three classes verified against the official PA Commonwealth Careers expanded job specifications (PayExp endpoint), which report the assigned Pay Scale Group and the Minimum/Maximum Annual salary for that group on the ST schedule. Grade assignment (job code -> pay scale group) and the dollar figures both come from the same official source page, so both conditions for Authoritative are met. Dollar figures reflect the ST schedule the PayExp pages currently resolve to (current_ST.pdf, effective 2025-07-01). The Job Specification Effective Date (07/15/2023) is the date the classification/grade assignment last changed, not the salary effective date. PA reports 75-hour and 80-hour annual figures; 75-hour is the standard work week for the F4/F5 bargaining-unit adjudicator series.

Disability Claims Adjudicator Trainee.basis: Authoritative — official PA job spec PayExp page reports Pay Scale Group 06 and the ST06 min/max annual; 75-hour basis used for annual_min/annual_max

Disability Claims Adjudicator.basis: Authoritative — official PA job spec PayExp page reports Pay Scale Group 07 and the ST07 min/max annual; 75-hour basis used for annual_min/annual_max

Disability Claims Adjudicator Supervisor.basis: Authoritative — official PA job spec PayExp page reports Pay Scale Group 08 and the ST08 min/max annual; 75-hour basis used for annual_min/annual_max
